Title: User can log in with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Navigate to /login. 2. Enter valid email and password. 3. Click Sign In.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Dashboard page and a welcome message is visible.

Title: User can create a new task with title and project
Steps: 1. Log in. 2. Click New Task. 3. Enter a title. 4. Select a project. 5. Click Save.
Expected Result: Task appears in the task list with the correct title and project label.
